description: The current, most capable model that runs on a single GPU

Granite 4 features improved instruction following (IF) and tool-calling capabilities, making them more effective in enterprise applications. These models excel at tasks such as reasoning, coding, and complex text generation.
The most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen model family to date. It excels in understanding and generating content that combines both text and images
A commercial-friendly small language model by NVIDIA optimized for roleplay, RAG QA, and function calling
A model from NVIDIA based on Llama 3 that excels at conversational question answering (QA) and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
The IBM Granite 8B models are designed to support tool-based use cases and support for retrieval augmented generation (RAG), streamlining code generation, translation and bug fixing
A capable language model for text to SQL generation for Postgres, Redshift and Snowflake that is on-par with the most capable generalist frontier models. It is fine-tuned from Llama 3 8B
The most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen model family to date. It excels in understanding and generating content that combines both text and images
The current, most capable model that runs on a single GPU
DeepSeek-R1 is a family of open reasoning models with performance approaching that of leading models, such as O3 and Gemini 2.5 Pro
DeepSeek-R1 is a family of open reasoning models with performance approaching that of leading models, such as O3 and Gemini 2.5 Pro
Qwen-Coder is a large language model optimized for code generation and understanding, with strong performance in multiple programming languages
Open-source medical large language model adapted from Llama 2 to the medical domain
Finance-Llama-8B is a fine-tuned Llama 3.1 8B model trained on 500k examples for tasks like QA, reasoning, sentiment, and NER. It supports multi-turn dialogue and is ideal for financial assistants
Large instructional language model suitable for the legal field
Kimi K2 Thinking, Moonshot AI's best open-source thinking model
DeepSeek-V3.1-Terminus is a hybrid model that supports both thinking mode and non-thinking model
Qwen3-VL is the most powerful vision-language model in the Qwen family to date. It excels in understanding and generating content that combines both text and images
